CustomField.description: This field is used to get the Amount of Invoice Line Item whose Invoice Line type is 'Security Deposit' & Autogenerated is 'True'. [LOAD: No] [JUSTIFICATION: This is Rollup Summary field so no needs to do load because this is automatically get populated.] [REPLACEMENT OBJECT API: NA] [REPLACEMENT FIELD API: NA] [COMMENTS: NA]
CustomField.inlineHelpText: This field is used to get the Amount of Invoice Line Item whose Invoice Line type is 'Security Deposit' & Autogenerated is 'True'.
CustomField.label: _SD AutoGenerated Line Amount
